summary: Generate mode: Tested UI Updates - Navigation changed (Experiences/Partners to Offers/Affiliations/Gallery), Login renamed to Member Login, Member dashboard updated to 6 tabs (My Card, My Profile, Affiliations, Bookings, Payments, Feedback), new Offers CRUD endpoints, Booking system for affiliates. All 22 backend tests pass, 36+ frontend tests pass.

issues.description: Gallery section shows broken image - 'bitz' image has invalid URL 'https://www.thebitsclub.com' which is not an image URL
Some affiliations cards don't have images set (image_url null) - third affiliate 'Test Gym' has no image

Member payments endpoint requires admin access but frontend calls it from member dashboard. The endpoint /members/{member_id}/payments has require_admin dependency. Frontend gracefully handles error but payments tab may not show data for non-admin users.

action_items: Fix gallery image URL - replace 'https://www.thebitsclub.com' with actual image URL
Add image_url to all affiliations/partners for consistent UI
Consider adding a member-accessible payments endpoint or modify existing to allow members to see their own payments
seed_data_creation: Created member record in members collection for test member 7777777777 (was missing user_id linkage for bookings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Updates tested: 1) Homepage navigation now has About Us, Offers, Affiliations, Gallery, Contact. 2) Login renamed to Member Login. 3) Offers section displays offers from /api/offers. 4) Affiliations section (renamed from Partners) shows enhanced details. 5) Gallery section shows images from /api/content/gallery. 6) Member dashboard has 6 tabs: My Card, My Profile, Affiliations, Bookings, Payments, Feedback. 7) Booking system at /api/bookings allows members to book visits to affiliates. Test credentials: member 7777777777/member123, admin 9999999999/admin123.

features_verified.homepage_navigation: Working - About Us, Offers, Affiliations, Gallery, Contact links in nav
features_verified.member_login_text: Working - Login renamed to Member Login
features_verified.offers_section: Working - Displays offers from API with discount badges
features_verified.affiliations_section: Working - Shows partners with enhanced details (phone, address, discounts)
features_verified.gallery_section: Working - Displays gallery images (one broken URL in test data)
features_verified.member_dashboard_tabs: Working - All 6 tabs functional: My Card, My Profile, Affiliations, Bookings, Payments, Feedback
features_verified.booking_system: Working - POST /api/bookings creates booking, GET /api/bookings returns member bookings
